Vendored MapLibre glyph ranges (vendor/glyphs/Open-Sans-Semibold/)

- 0-255.pbf and 256-511.pbf are pre-rendered SDF glyph ranges (Unicode
  codepoints U+0000–U+01FF: Basic Latin, Latin-1 Supplement, and Latin
  Extended-A) for the Open Sans Semibold typeface, in the standard
  MapLibre/Mapbox glyph PBF format.
- Downloaded 2026-07-16 from the MapLibre demo tiles glyph server
  (https://demotiles.maplibre.org/font/Open%20Sans%20Semibold/{range}.pbf),
  which serves the glyphs generated by the openmaptiles/fonts project
  (https://github.com/openmaptiles/fonts).
- The Open Sans typeface is copyright Google and licensed under the
  Apache License, Version 2.0 (http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0),
  the license of the font release the openmaptiles/fonts glyphs were
  generated from.

The extension serves these ranges to MapLibre from its own package
(chrome-extension:// origin), so peak-name labels in the 3D terrain view
never trigger a network request to a font CDN.
